C1A_SRVM_V3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA6CF2
Recv ID: 18DAF26C
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6C
Func Name: BEV - SRVM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "FICOSA    ",
    "soft": "SW4.1     ",
    "version": "01071001                        "
  }
]
